title: Create GitHub issue for v0.3.0 release

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--fix-signing
comments.content: Completed: Fixed agent signing chicken-and-egg during init. Three fixes: (1) Added SyncManager::ensure_agent_key_published() called from sync_cmd to auto-publish keys deferred from agent init. (2) Swapped bootstrap ordering so publish_agent_key runs before configure_signing. (3) Key-publishing commits use unsigned path to avoid requiring signing before it's configured. All 149 tests pass, clippy/fmt clean. Branch: feature/fix-agent-signing-init, ready for push+PR.
